# Freeflow Dynamics

> Freediving coaching and human-performance programs with professional freediver Natalie Bruce — online worldwide, with in-water sessions by arrangement.

Natalie Bruce is a US professional freediver and human-performance coach. She holds 12 continental and 17 US national AIDA records across depth, static and dynamic disciplines. Freeflow Dynamics is her coaching practice: calm, mindful breath-hold training combined with elite performance methods.

- Location: Colorado, USA (programs run online worldwide; in-water sessions by arrangement)
- Contact: info@freeflowdynamics.com
- Booking: https://calendly.com/nataliefreediverbruce
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/natalie.freediver

## Coaching programs
- [Pool Only Trainings](https://freeflowdynamics.com/programs.html): $175/month, online. 2–3 structured pool sessions per week (static, dynamic & swimming), weekly programming, WhatsApp support. Suits beginners through competitive divers.
- [Full Performance Package](https://freeflowdynamics.com/programs.html): $275/month, online. Everything in Pool Only plus dry & gym programming and a monthly video call. For divers training like an athlete.
- [Private Coaching](https://freeflowdynamics.com/programs.html): custom pricing. Fully bespoke 1:1 coaching, online plus an in-water option by arrangement.

## Pages
- [Home](https://freeflowdynamics.com/): overview of the practice and programs.
- [About Natalie Bruce](https://freeflowdynamics.com/about.html): bio, philosophy, records.
- [Programs](https://freeflowdynamics.com/programs.html): the three coaching programs, inclusions, pricing, and FAQ.
- [Competition Records](https://freeflowdynamics.com/competition.html): AIDA competition records and history.
- [Upcoming Events](https://freeflowdynamics.com/events.html): workshops, trips and upcoming dates.
- [Media](https://freeflowdynamics.com/media.html): films, podcasts and press.
- [Contact](https://freeflowdynamics.com/contact.html): email, Instagram, and booking a free coaching call.
- [Partners](https://freeflowdynamics.com/partners.html): brand partnerships and the brand kit.
